message:
feat(cli): add allowlist CLI commands (git_safety_guard-1gt.2.3)

Add comprehensive allowlist management CLI:
- dcg allowlist add/add-command/list/remove/validate subcommands
- dcg allow/unallow shortcuts for quick access
- TOML mutation via toml_edit preserves formatting
- Audit metadata: added_by, added_at (RFC 3339)
- Expiration and environment conditions support
- Auto-detects project vs user allowlist layer

Also fix pre-existing clippy warnings in trace.rs:
- option_if_let_else -> map_or_else
- cast_precision_loss -> allow annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
